zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Hüter於1646年8月30日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯波頓巴賀時，她的父親Johannes Georg Hüther26歲，母親Anna Appollonia Hanss31歲。她於大約1663年與Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯波頓巴賀結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1704年4月19日在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Hüter于1646年8月30日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯波頓巴賀时，她的父亲Johannes Georg Hüther26岁，母亲Anna Appollonia Hanss31岁。她于大约1663年与Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯波頓巴賀结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1704年4月19日在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆享年57岁。

occupational name for a hatter, Middle High German huotære, huoter.

variants.name: Huether
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Ernst, Ewald, Klaus, Kurt, Lothar, Otto, Reinhold.
German (Hüther): occupational name for a herdsman, field guard, or guardian, Middle High German hüetære. Compare Huther .

variants.name: Huther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Arno, Hans, Ralf.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Hüter was born on 30 August 1646, in Bottenbach, Pirmasens, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Johannes Georg Hüther, was 26 and her mother, Anna Appollonia Hanss, was 31. She married Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang about 1663, in Bottenbach, Pirmasens, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 April 1704, in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Hüter est née le 30 août 1646, à Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Johannes Georg Hüther, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anna Appollonia Hanss, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang environ 1663, à Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1704, à Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Hüter am 30. August 1646 in Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johannes Georg Hüther 26 und ihre Mutter Anna Appollonia Hanss 31. Sie hat um 1663 in Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. April 1704 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Hüter è nata il il 30 agosto 1646 nel Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Johannes Georg Hüther, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Anna Appollonia Hanss, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang circa 1663, nel Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1704, nel Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Hüterが1646年8月30日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ピルマセンスボッテンバチで生まれた時，父Johannes Georg Hütherは26歳，母Anna Appollonia Hanssは31歳であった。約1663年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ピルマセンスボッテンバチでHenrich Ludwig Vogelgesangと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1704年4月19日にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスジャーシェイムハービトズヘイムで57歳で死去した。

ko.Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜도 인 데르 p팔즈 누ss도르프
ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Hüter(이)가 1646년 8월 30일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 피마센스 벗텐바치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johannes Georg Hüther(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Appollonia Hanss(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1663년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 피마센스 벗텐바치에서 Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1704년 4월 19일 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 그르셰임 허비츠하임에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-: Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Hüter nasceu em 30 de agosto de 1646, em Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Johannes Georg Hüther, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anna Appollonia Hanss, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang aproximadamente 1663, em Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de abril de 1704, em Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha, com 57 anos.

ru.Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-: нуssдорф, ландау ин дир пфалз, раинланд-пфалз, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Hüter родилась 30 августа 1646 г. в местности боттенбач, ландкрис пирмеисенс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Johannes Georg Hüther было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Appollonia Hanss, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang около 1663 г. в местности боттенбач, ландкрис пирмеисенс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 апреля 1704 г. в местности хирбицхим, джиршим, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-: Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia Hüter nació el 30 de agosto de 1646, en Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Johannes Georg Hüther, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anna Appollonia Hanss, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang aproximadamente 1663, en Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de abril de 1704, en Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania, a la edad de 57 años.
